mapper.select:
SELECT -- 테이블 전체 컬럼 YYYYMM, SEL_CODE, DW_SITE, 구분, 구분_ORD, 도우코드, MODEL_N_TYPE, [도우모델], 작업구분, ORG작업구분, [model], [Inch], SITE,
-- 수량 컬럼 ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0) AS BOH_MONTH, ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0) AS IN_MONTH, ISNULL(BONUS_MONTH, 0) AS BONUS_MONTH, ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0) AS EOH_MONTH, ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0) AS OUT_MONTH, ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0) AS LOSS_MONTH, ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0) AS NG_MONTH, ISNULL(수율제외_MONTH, 0) AS 수율제외_MONTH, ISNULL(REWORK진행_MONTH, 0) AS REWORK진행_MONTH, ISNULL(SHIPPING_PLAN_MONTH, 0) AS SHIPPING_PLAN_MONTH, ISNULL(SHIPPING_ACTUAL_MONTH, 0) AS SHIPPING_ACTUAL_MONTH, ISNULL(MATERIAL_LOSS, 0) AS MATERIAL_LOSS,
-- IN-OUT 체크: BOH + IN + BONUS - EOH - OUT - LOSS (ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(BONUS_MONTH, 0)) - (ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0)) AS IN_OUT_체크,
-- LOSS 체크: LOSS_MONTH - (NG + 수율제외 + REWORK진행) ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0) - (ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(수율제외_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(REWORK진행_MONTH, 0)) AS LOSS_체크,
-- 상태: 정상/오류 CASE WHEN ABS((ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(BONUS_MONTH, 0)) - (ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 OR ABS(ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0) - (ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(수율제외_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(REWORK진행_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN '오류' ELSE '정상' END AS 상태,
-- 비고: 오류 내역 표시 CASE WHEN ABS((ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(BONUS_MONTH, 0)) - (ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 AND ABS(ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0) - (ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(수율제외_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(REWORK진행_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN 'IN-OUT 오류, LOSS 수량 오류' WHEN ABS((ISNULL(BOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(IN_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(BONUS_MONTH, 0)) - (ISNULL(EOH_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(OUT_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN 'IN-OUT 오류' WHEN ABS(ISNULL(LOSS_MONTH, 0) - (ISNULL(NG_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(수율제외_MONTH, 0) + ISNULL(REWORK진행_MONTH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN 'LOSS 수량 오류' ELSE '' END AS 비고 FROM DOI_PROD_SUBUL WHERE 1=1
AND YYYYMM = #{yyyymm}
AND DW_SITE = #{site}
AND [도우모델] LIKE '%' + #{dwModel} + '%'
ORDER BY [도우모델], YYYYMM
